DRYING_RAIN_ROT.name: drying-enable-rain-rot
DRYING_RAIN_ROT.comment: Enable rain-based spoilage acceleration on drying frames

DRYING_WIND.name: drying-enable-wind
DRYING_WIND.comment: Enable wind-based drying acceleration on drying frames

SALTPAN_ENABLED.name: saltpan-enabled
SALTPAN_ENABLED.comment: Master toggle for salt pan evaporation

EXPOSURE_ENABLED.name: exposure-enabled
EXPOSURE_ENABLED.comment: Master toggle for the exposure system (off by default — opt-in)

DRYING_RAIN_MULT.name: drying-rain-rot-multiplier
DRYING_RAIN_MULT.comment: Max perish speed multiplier during heavy rain

DRYING_WIND_MULT.name: drying-wind-multiplier
DRYING_WIND_MULT.comment: Wind drying bonus multiplier (higher = faster drying in wind)

DRYING_SPEED_MULT.name: drying-speed-multiplier
DRYING_SPEED_MULT.comment: Base drying speed multiplier on the rack

DRYING_RAIN_THRESHOLD.name: drying-rain-threshold
DRYING_RAIN_THRESHOLD.comment: Rainfall level (0-1) above which rain rot activates

SALTPAN_CAPACITY.name: saltpan-capacity
SALTPAN_CAPACITY.comment: Maximum litres of saltwater the pan holds

SALTPAN_EVAP_RATE.name: saltpan-evap-rate
SALTPAN_EVAP_RATE.comment: Base evaporation rate in litres per hour at 20C

SALTPAN_YIELD.name: saltpan-salt-yield
SALTPAN_YIELD.comment: Salt items yielded per litre of saltwater evaporated

SALTPAN_MIN_TEMP.name: saltpan-min-temp
SALTPAN_MIN_TEMP.comment: Minimum temperature (C) for evaporation to occur

SALTPAN_MAX_TEMP_MULT.name: saltpan-max-temp-mult
SALTPAN_MAX_TEMP_MULT.comment: Maximum temperature multiplier cap for evaporation

GRIDDLE_SPEED_CLAY.name: griddle-speed-clay
GRIDDLE_SPEED_CLAY.comment: Cook speed multiplier for clay griddle

GRIDDLE_SPEED_COPPER.name: griddle-speed-copper
GRIDDLE_SPEED_COPPER.comment: Cook speed multiplier for copper griddle

GRIDDLE_SPEED_BRONZE.name: griddle-speed-bronze
GRIDDLE_SPEED_BRONZE.comment: Cook speed multiplier for bronze griddle

GRIDDLE_SPEED_IRON.name: griddle-speed-iron
GRIDDLE_SPEED_IRON.comment: Cook speed multiplier for iron griddle

GRIDDLE_SPEED_STEEL.name: griddle-speed-steel
GRIDDLE_SPEED_STEEL.comment: Cook speed multiplier for steel griddle

EXPOSURE_HEAT_THRESHOLD.name: exposure-heat-threshold
EXPOSURE_HEAT_THRESHOLD.comment: Temperature (C) above which heat exposure accumulates

EXPOSURE_COLD_THRESHOLD.name: exposure-cold-threshold
EXPOSURE_COLD_THRESHOLD.comment: Temperature (C) below which cold exposure accumulates

EXPOSURE_ACCUM_RATE.name: exposure-accumulation-rate
EXPOSURE_ACCUM_RATE.comment: Base exposure gain per game hour at threshold boundary

EXPOSURE_DECAY_RATE.name: exposure-decay-rate
EXPOSURE_DECAY_RATE.comment: Base exposure loss per game hour when sheltered

EXPOSURE_WIND_MULT.name: exposure-wind-multiplier
EXPOSURE_WIND_MULT.comment: Multiplier on accumulation rate from wind speed

EXPOSURE_TIER1.name: exposure-tier1-threshold
EXPOSURE_TIER1.comment: Exposure level (0-1) at which Tier 1 effects begin

EXPOSURE_TIER2.name: exposure-tier2-threshold
EXPOSURE_TIER2.comment: Exposure level (0-1) at which Tier 2 effects begin

EXPOSURE_TIER3.name: exposure-tier3-threshold
EXPOSURE_TIER3.comment: Exposure level (0-1) at which Tier 3 effects begin

HS_T1_SPEED.name: heatstroke-t1-speed-penalty
HS_T1_SPEED.comment: Walk speed reduction at Heatstroke I (0.1 = 10% slower)

HS_T1_DAMAGE_TAKEN.name: heatstroke-t1-damage-taken
HS_T1_DAMAGE_TAKEN.comment: Extra damage taken at Heatstroke I (0.15 = 15% more)

HS_T2_HUNGER.name: heatstroke-t2-hunger-rate
HS_T2_HUNGER.comment: Hunger rate multiplier at Heatstroke II (1.5 = 50% faster)

HS_T2_SATIETY.name: heatstroke-t2-satiety-penalty
HS_T2_SATIETY.comment: Food effectiveness reduction at Heatstroke II (0.5 = 50% less)

HS_T3_SPEED.name: heatstroke-t3-speed-penalty
HS_T3_SPEED.comment: Walk speed reduction at Heatstroke III

HS_T3_DAMAGE.name: heatstroke-t3-damage
HS_T3_DAMAGE.comment: HP damage per 10 seconds at Heatstroke III

FB_T1_HEALTH.name: frostbite-t1-health-reduction
FB_T1_HEALTH.comment: Max health reduction (HP) at Frostbite I

FB_T2_HEALTH.name: frostbite-t2-health-reduction
FB_T2_HEALTH.comment: Max health reduction (HP) at Frostbite II

FB_T2_DROP.name: frostbite-t2-item-drop-chance
FB_T2_DROP.comment: Chance per 10s to drop held item at Frostbite II

FB_T3_HEALTH.name: frostbite-t3-health-reduction
FB_T3_HEALTH.comment: Max health reduction (HP) at Frostbite III

FB_T3_DROP.name: frostbite-t3-item-drop-chance
FB_T3_DROP.comment: Chance per 10s to drop held item at Frostbite III

FB_T3_DAMAGE.name: frostbite-t3-damage
FB_T3_DAMAGE.comment: HP damage per 10 seconds at Frostbite III
